stemHtml: A crew are briefing a departure with obstacles for a medium range jet transport aircraft. Considering the Net take-off flight path for a Class A aircraft, what is the bank angle limit in the first and second segment?

options.a: 0° in the first segment; 15° in the second segment.
options.b: You may commence a turn in either segment provided you have calculated and are able to accept the resulting performance deficiency.
options.c: 15° in the first segment; 15° in the second segment.
options.d: 0° in the first segment; 0° in the second segment.
